## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [Contributing guide](https://github.com/MakerCommons/.github/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The change is focused (one thing at a time).
- [ ] I tested it and it actually works — not just "the AI said so".
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] It stays free and open (no paywall, AGPL-3.0 compatible).

<!-- Limitations, open questions, follow-ups. Be honest — that's the culture here. -->
